sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 96:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 96:1
items.html: The three Sefirot Hod, Yesod, and Malchut are all merely the expansion of Malchut. Netzah and Hod are considered one Sefira. Hence, the four Sefirot NHYM are all the expansion of Malchut. (Inner Observation, Item 5)
